pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for the alumni office site, highlighting key actions and featured content. Serves as the starting point for all main tasks (events, giving, chapters, benefits, directory, mentoring, scholarships, and newsletters).
primary_functions: Provide quick access links to core tasks such as events, giving, chapters, benefits, directory, mentoring, and scholarships
Highlight featured events, campaigns, and announcements relevant to alumni
Orient users with brief explanations of what they can do on the site

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a quick link such as "View all events" or an events-related call-to-action

params.eventId: ID of a featured event card clicked by the user

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a featured event card

params.fund_id: fund_code or fund ID associated with a featured campaign, e.g., the Student Scholarships fund
params.amount: Optional suggested gift amount from a featured campaign

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a featured campaign tile or "Make a Gift" quick link
Click a "Find local chapters" quick link
Click an "Explore alumni benefits" quick link
Click a "Find Alumni" quick link
Click a "Volunteer & Mentor" quick link
Click a "Scholarships & Support" quick link
Click a "Stay Connected" or "Email newsletters" panel on the homepage
Click a direct "Sign up for alumni newsletter" button on the homepage

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Home" header navigation link
Default site entry point when navigating to index.html

pages.name: Events
pages.description: Browse and filter upcoming alumni events, including networking events by city, date, type, and price. Supports deep-linking with pre-applied filters and sorts.
primary_functions: Display a list of upcoming events with key details like date, location, type, and price
Provide filters for city/location, date range, event type/category (e.g., networking), and price constraints
Allow sorting of events by options such as date, price_low_to_high, and relevance
Link to individual event detail pages for full information and registration

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected city filter for events (e.g., "Chicago" for task 1)
Pre-selected state filter for events
Pre-selected country filter for events
Pre-selected event type (e.g., "networking")
Start of the pre-applied date filter range (ISO date, e.g., first day of next calendar month)
End of the pre-applied date filter range (ISO date, e.g., last day of next calendar month)
Minimum ticket price to display
Maximum ticket price to display (e.g., 40 for task 1)
Optional chapter ID to filter events associated with a specific chapter
Pre-selected sort option such as "price_low_to_high" or "date_asc"
Current pagination page for the event list

params.eventId: ID of the event card clicked by the user

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an event card or event name in the events list
Click a breadcrumb or logo to return to the homepage

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Events" header navigation link
Accessible with pre-configured query parameters for city, dates, type, price, and sort
Linked from homepage, Stay Connected overview, and chapter-related content

pages.name: Event Detail
pages.description: Detailed information page for a single event, with registration and ticket selection. Supports deep-linking by event ID from listings and featured events.
primary_functions: Show full event details including description, schedule, location map, category, and ticket pricing options
Allow users to choose ticket type (including the lowest-priced eligible ticket) and quantity
Provide a registration form to collect attendee information such as name, email, graduation year, and industry
Collect required consents or agreement to terms and submit the event registration

incoming_params.description: ID of the event whose details and registration form should be displayed

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Events" link or breadcrumb

params.chapterId: ID of the associated chapter if the event is chapter-sponsored

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the chapter name or "View this chapter" link within the event details

access_methods.description: Accessed via event_detail.html?eventId={eventId} from event listings or featured event links
Linked from Events listing, homepage featured events, and chapter pages

pages.name: Make a Gift
pages.description: Donation and pledge page for making one-time gifts or pledges to specific funds such as Student Scholarships. Supports pre-selecting a fund or amount via URL parameters.
primary_functions: Let users choose gift type (such as one_time_gift) and enter a custom gift amount
Provide a fund/designation selector including options like student_scholarships
Offer tribute options (e.g., in_honor_of, in_memory_of) with honoree name fields
Collect donor contact information such as name, email, and postal code
Offer payment or billing methods including non_card options such as bill_me_later or pay_by_mail
Submit and confirm a gift or pledge with all selected options and consents

incoming_params.description: Fund ID to pre-select in the fund/designation dropdown (e.g., Student Scholarships fund)
Suggested gift amount to pre-fill in the gift amount field
Gift type to pre-select, such as "one_time_gift"
Optional initial tribute type such as "in_honor_of"
Optional initial honoree name for the tribute section

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Return to Home" link after submitting a gift or pledge
Click a "View scholarships" link from confirmation messaging

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Give" header navigation link
Linked from homepage featured campaigns and scholarship-related calls-to-action
Supports deep links with pre-selected fund, amount, and tribute options

pages.name: Stay Connected
pages.description: Overview of ways alumni can stay connected, including newsletters, chapters, events, and mentoring. Serves as the main gateway to email subscriptions and local engagement.
primary_functions: Summarize channels for staying connected such as email newsletters, local chapters, events, and mentoring
Provide a clear link or button to the email newsletter subscription page
Highlight other engagement opportunities with links to chapters, events, and volunteer pages

incoming_params.description: Code for which engagement channel to highlight on load (e.g., "email_newsletters", "local_chapters")

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Sign up for email newsletters" or similar button
Click a "Find local chapters" or "Regional groups" card
Click an "Attend an event" or similar engagement card
Click a "Volunteer & Mentor" card

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Stay Connected" header navigation link
Linked from the homepage and other engagement-related content

pages.name: Email Newsletter Subscription
pages.description: Form for alumni to subscribe to and manage email newsletter preferences, including topic and frequency selection.
primary_functions: Collect subscriber information including email address, first name, last name, graduation year, and school/faculty
Allow selection of content topics such as career_services and alumni_events with the ability to deselect other topics
Provide delivery frequency options including a monthly_digest choice
Collect consent to receive email communications from the alumni office and submit subscription preferences

incoming_params.description: Source code of where the subscription link was clicked (for analytics and messaging)
Comma-separated list of topic codes to pre-select (e.g., "career_services,alumni_events" for task 3)
Newsletter frequency to pre-select (e.g., "monthly_digest")

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Stay Connected" link or button after saving preferences
Click a "Return to Home" link after subscription

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Email Newsletters" footer link
Linked from the Stay Connected overview and potentially from the homepage
Supports pre-configured topics and frequency via query parameters

pages.name: Chapters & Clubs
pages.description: Listing and discovery page for regional alumni chapters and clubs. Supports filtering by state/region and membership fee to help users find appropriate local groups.
primary_functions: Display a list of alumni chapters with summary information including location, membership fee, and upcoming events count
Provide filters for location (e.g., state such as california) and maximum membership fee
Allow sorting of chapters by criteria such as events_most_to_least or name_a_to_z
Link to individual chapter detail pages for more information and membership options

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected state filter (e.g., "California" for task 4)
Pre-selected regional filter
Maximum membership fee to display (e.g., 30 for task 4)
Pre-selected sort option such as "events_most_to_least"
Current pagination page for the chapter list

params.chapterId: ID of the chapter card clicked by the user

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a chapter name or "View chapter" link
Click a "View events in this state" link associated with a chapter

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Chapters & Clubs" header navigation link
Supports deep linking with state, region, fee, and sort filters
Linked from the Stay Connected overview and homepage quick links

pages.name: Chapter Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific alumni chapter with membership enrollment and an overview of upcoming events.
primary_functions: Present detailed information about the chapter including service area, typical activities, and membership fee
Show the number and examples of upcoming events associated with the chapter
Provide a membership form capturing name, email, role (e.g., alumni), graduation year, and membership option/fee
Collect agreement to membership terms and submit chapter membership enrollment

incoming_params.description: ID of the chapter whose details and membership form should be displayed

params.state: State value of the current chapter

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to chapters" or "View all chapters in this state" link
Click a "View all events for this chapter" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via chapter_detail.html?chapterId={chapterId} from the chapter listing or event associations
Linked from Chapters & Clubs listing and from chapter-related event details

pages.name: Alumni Benefits
pages.description: Browseable catalog of alumni benefits and discounts, including travel offers. Supports filtering for travel and discount thresholds to find qualifying benefits for saving.
primary_functions: Display a list of benefits with key details such as category, discount percentage, and partner name
Provide filters for benefit category (e.g., travel or travel_transportation) and minimum discount percentage
Allow sorting of benefits by options such as discount_high_to_low or alphabetical
Link to individual benefit detail pages for full offer terms and saving to a personal list

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected benefit category (e.g., "travel" or "travel_transportation" for task 5)
Minimum discount percentage filter (e.g., 10 for task 5)
Pre-selected sort option such as "discount_high_to_low"
Current pagination page for the benefits list

params.benefitId: ID of the benefit card clicked by the user

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a benefit card or "View details" link
Click a "View Saved Benefits" link in the benefits listing

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Alumni Benefits" header navigation link
Supports deep linking with category, discount, and sort filters
Linked from homepage quick links and Stay Connected overview

pages.name: Benefit Detail
pages.description: Detailed description of a single alumni benefit, with option to save to a personal list and see existing saved state.
primary_functions: Show full benefit details including discount rate, eligibility, redemption instructions, and exclusions
Indicate the benefit category and any geographic or date limitations
Provide a button to save or unsave the benefit in the user's saved benefits list
Offer navigation back to the filtered benefits listing via breadcrumbs or a back_to_results link

incoming_params.description: ID of the benefit whose details should be displayed
Optional encoded URL or context token used to reconstruct the "Back to results" link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Benefits" or "Back to results" link
Click a "View My Saved Benefits" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via benefit_detail.html?benefitId={benefitId} from benefits listing or My Saved
Linked from the Alumni Benefits listing and from saved benefits in My Saved

pages.name: Alumni Directory Search
pages.description: Searchable alumni directory with advanced filters and sortable results for discovering fellow alumni, including by location, industry, and graduation year range.
primary_functions: Provide basic and advanced search fields including name, city, state, industry/job_function, and graduation_year_range
Allow users to filter alumni to specific combinations such as san_francisco software engineering alumni from 2010_to_2020
Display search results in a list with sortable options such as last_name_a_to_z
Link each result to an individual alumni profile detail page

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected city filter (e.g., "San Francisco" for task 6)
Pre-selected state filter
Pre-selected industry/job function code such as "software_engineering"
Minimum graduation year filter (e.g., 2010 for task 6)
Maximum graduation year filter (e.g., 2020 for task 6)
Pre-selected sort option such as "last_name_a_to_z"
Optional free-text search query (name, employer, etc.)
Current pagination page for search results

params.alumniProfileId: ID of the alumni profile clicked in the results list

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an alumnus/alumna name or "View profile" link
Click a "View My Contact List" link

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Alumni Directory" header navigation link
Supports deep links with pre-configured filters and sort order
Linked from the homepage and other networking-related content

pages.name: Alumni Profile Detail
pages.description: Profile page for an individual alumnus/alumna with option to add to or manage a personal contact list.
primary_functions: Display key profile information such as name, class year, location, industry, and current role
Provide a button to add the alumnus/alumna to the user's saved contact list
Optionally allow the user to add a brief note or tag to the saved contact entry
Offer navigation back to directory search results to continue browsing

incoming_params.description: ID of the alumni profile whose details should be displayed
Optional encoded URL or token used to reconstruct a "Back to results" link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to search results" link
Click a "View My Contact List" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via alumni_profile.html?alumniProfileId={id} from the directory or My Saved
Linked from Alumni Directory Search results and from saved contacts in My Saved

pages.name: Volunteer & Mentor Overview
pages.description: Overview page for volunteer and mentoring opportunities, including a comparison of mentoring programs for different audiences such as current students and recent graduates.
primary_functions: Introduce volunteer and mentoring opportunities available to alumni
List and compare mentoring programs, including target audiences such as current_students and recent_graduates
Highlight key attributes of each program such as time commitment, format, and application periods
Link to individual mentoring program detail pages for full information and enrollment

incoming_params.description: Optional audience code (e.g., "current_students") to highlight the matching mentoring program

params.mentoringProgramId: ID of the mentoring program card clicked by the user

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Learn more" or program name in the program comparison

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Volunteer & Mentor" header navigation link
Linked from Stay Connected overview and homepage engagement sections
Supports highlighting a program based on the audience parameter

pages.name: Mentoring Program Detail
pages.description: Detail and enrollment page for a specific mentoring program (e.g., the program serving current students), including expertise topics, time commitment, and meeting formats.
primary_functions: Describe the mentoring program’s purpose, target audience, eligibility, and expectations
Explain typical time commitment options and supported meeting formats (e.g., video_chat, in_person)
Provide a mentor enrollment form to capture name, email, alumni affiliation, graduation year, and areas of expertise
Allow selection of multiple expertise topics including technology and entrepreneurship
Allow selection of a time commitment option such as two_hours_per_month and preferred meeting format
Collect required consents or privacy agreements and submit mentor enrollment

incoming_params.description: ID of the mentoring program whose detail and enrollment form should be displayed

params.audience: Audience code of the current program (e.g., "current_students")

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to mentoring programs" link after viewing or submitting enrollment

access_methods.description: Accessed via mentoring_program.html?mentoringProgramId={id} from the overview page or engagement CTAs
Linked from Volunteer & Mentor Overview cards and other program promotions

pages.name: Scholarships & Support
pages.description: Listing page for scholarships, including those for children of alumni, with filters for eligibility, level of study, and deadline, plus sorting by award amount.
primary_functions: Display a list of scholarships with key details such as award amount, eligibility, level_of_study, and deadline
Provide filters for eligibility group (e.g., children_of_alumni) and level_of_study (e.g., undergraduate)
Offer a deadline filter to show only scholarships with deadlines after a specified date
Allow sorting by award_amount_high_to_low and other criteria
Link to individual scholarship detail pages for full information and saving

incoming_params.description: Pre-selected eligibility group (e.g., "children_of_alumni" for task 8)
Pre-selected level of study (e.g., "undergraduate")
Minimum deadline date (ISO) to filter scholarships (e.g., date after 2025-03-01)
Pre-selected sort option such as "award_amount_high_to_low"
Current pagination page for the scholarship list

params.scholarshipId: ID of the scholarship card clicked by the user

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a scholarship name or "View details" link

params.fund_id: ID of the Student Scholarships fund if promoted from this page

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Support Student Scholarships" giving call-to-action

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Scholarships & Support" header navigation link
Supports deep linking with eligibility, level of study, deadline, and sort filters
Linked from homepage, About page, and giving-related content

pages.name: Scholarship Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific scholarship with option to save, annotate with notes, and link to related giving opportunities.
primary_functions: Present full scholarship information including eligibility criteria, award range, application requirements, and deadline
Indicate that the scholarship is applicable to certain groups such as children_of_alumni and undergraduate students
Provide a button to save or unsave the scholarship to the user’s saved scholarships list
Offer a notes field to record personalized notes such as undergrad_child_of_alum_post_3_1_2025 and save these notes with the scholarship

incoming_params.description: ID of the scholarship whose details should be displayed
Optional encoded URL or token used to reconstruct a "Back to results" link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Scholarships" or "Back to results" link
Click a "View My Saved Scholarships" link

params.fund_id: Fund ID associated with this scholarship when a giving CTA is present

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Support Student Scholarships" or similar giving call-to-action

access_methods.description: Accessed via scholarship_detail.html?scholarshipId={id} from the Scholarships listing or My Saved
Linked from Scholarships & Support listing and saved scholarships in My Saved

pages.name: My Saved Items & Contacts
pages.description: Consolidated view of the user’s saved benefits, scholarships, and contact list entries, with tools to manage notes and remove items.
primary_functions: Display a list of saved benefits with links back to each benefit_detail page and options to remove items
Display a list of saved scholarships with notes and links back to scholarship_detail pages
Show a contact list of saved alumni profiles with links back to alumni_profile pages
Allow users to edit notes or remove entries from any saved list

incoming_params.description: Section to focus on when loading (e.g., "benefits", "scholarships", or "contacts")

params.benefitId: benefit_id of the selected saved benefit

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved benefit name or "View benefit" link

params.scholarshipId: scholarship_id of the selected saved scholarship

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a saved scholarship name or "View scholarship" link
Click a saved contact name or "View profile" link
Click an "Explore more benefits" link from the Saved Benefits section
Click an "Explore more scholarships" link from the Saved Scholarships section
Click an "Find more alumni" link from the Contact List section

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "My Saved" header navigation link
Linked from benefit, scholarship, and alumni profile detail pages
Supports focusing on a specific section via the section query parameter

pages.name: About the Alumni Office
pages.description: Information about the alumni office, including mission, contact details, and key policies such as privacy and terms. Also orients users to core site sections.
primary_functions: Explain the mission, services, and structure of the alumni office
Provide contact information such as email addresses, phone numbers, and mailing address
Present key policy information including privacy, terms_of_use, and accessibility statements
Offer links to core site sections for users who arrive via this page

incoming_params.description: Section anchor to scroll to, such as "privacy_terms" when accessed via the "Privacy & Terms" footer link

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an "Events" core section link in the About page
Click a "Make a Gift" core section link
Click a "Chapters & Clubs" core section link
Click an "Alumni Benefits" core section link
Click an "Alumni Directory" core section link
Click a "Mentoring Programs" core section link
Click a "Scholarships & Support" core section link
Click an "Email Newsletters" link in the services section

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "About the Alumni Office" footer link
Privacy & Terms footer link uses about.html?section=privacy_terms to deep-link to policy content

header_links.description: Browse and register for alumni events
Make a gift or pledge to university funds
Overview of newsletters and engagement opportunities
Find and join local alumni chapters and clubs
Search for and connect with fellow alumni
Explore mentoring programs and volunteer opportunities
Browse scholarships and support for alumni families
View saved benefits, scholarships, and contacts

footer_links.description: Learn more about the alumni office and how to contact us
Support the university with a gift or pledge
Discover local alumni chapters and clubs
Explore alumni benefits and travel discounts
Learn about mentoring opportunities for alumni
Find scholarships for alumni and their families
Read privacy, terms of use, and accessibility information
